name: hiring
description: Use this skill when the user needs to hire a developer, find a technical contractor, vet engineering talent, manage freelancers, write a job brief, decide between hiring and contracting, or bring on their first technical team member. Also use when the user says 'I need a developer,' 'should I hire someone,' 'how do I find a contractor,' 'I need technical help I can't do myself,' or 'AI keeps getting this wrong, I need a human.' Covers contractor sourcing, vetting, management, and the founder-dev
author: whawkinsiv
summary_zh: 这是一个帮你搞定技术招聘与外包的助手。当你需要找开发、评估人才，或纠结招人还是外包时，它能出谋划策，特别适合初创团队建技术班底，或需要真人接手AI搞不定的事。
